assets.name: Creator Brand Positioning
assets.description: Judges whether a creator's brand positioning is clear, defensible, and unoccupied. Uses the four-cell test (OCCUPIED / DEFENSIBLE / RESONANT / VERIFIABLE) to determine if a candidate positioning is ready to publish.
assets.description_zh: 判断创作者的品牌定位是否清晰、稳固、无人占领。用四格测试（OCCUPIED / DEFENSIBLE / RESONANT / VERIFIABLE）判断候选定位是否可发布。

assets.name: Viral Topic Selection
assets.description: Helps AI evaluate content topics for viral potential — checking tension, curiosity gap, emotional resonance, and social currency.
assets.description_zh: 帮助 AI 判断内容选题的传播潜力——检查冲突张力、好奇心缺口、情绪共鸣和社交货币。
assets.legacy_note: Published 2026-06 under the pre-pipeline strategy. Built with kdna-studio-cli < 0.6.0; uses the older source schema (scenarios / growth_stages). Not part of the A-layer flagship pipeline. See the legacy assets audit plan (private).
assets.superseded_reason: Pre-pipeline asset with no source tree in the kdna-assets-internal lineage. Replaced by assets produced via the 10-gate pipeline. GitHub Release remains for backward compatibility but is no longer listed in README.

assets.name: Title Attraction
assets.description: Helps AI evaluate title attraction — checking audience clarity, information gap, specific benefit, credibility, and promise-content alignment.
assets.description_zh: 帮助 AI 判断标题吸引力——检查受众明确度、信息缺口、具体利益、可信度和承诺匹配度。
assets.legacy_note: Published 2026-06 under the pre-pipeline strategy. Built with kdna-studio-cli < 0.6.0; uses the older source schema (scenarios / growth_stages). Not part of the A-layer flagship pipeline. See the legacy assets audit plan (private).
assets.superseded_reason: Pre-pipeline asset with no source tree in the kdna-assets-internal lineage. Replaced by assets produced via the 10-gate pipeline. GitHub Release remains for backward compatibility but is no longer listed in README.

assets.name: Short Video Hook Judgment
assets.description: Helps AI evaluate short video opening hooks — checking first-3-second gap, scene conflict, speakability, and audience retention signals.
assets.description_zh: 帮助 AI 判断短视频开头前三秒的钩子效果——检查信息缺口、场景冲突、口播顺口度和留存信号。
assets.legacy_note: Published 2026-06 under the pre-pipeline strategy. Built with kdna-studio-cli < 0.6.0; uses the older source schema (scenarios / growth_stages). Not part of the A-layer flagship pipeline. See the legacy assets audit plan (private).
assets.superseded_reason: Pre-pipeline asset with no source tree in the kdna-assets-internal lineage. Replaced by assets produced via the 10-gate pipeline. GitHub Release remains for backward compatibility but is no longer listed in README.

assets.name: Project Context Judgment
assets.description: Judges what belongs in an Agent-facing project document (AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules) — classifying each candidate line into CARRY / RELOCATE / DROP / CONVERT.
assets.description_zh: 判断 AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules 等项目文档的每一行内容——将候选行归类为 CARRY / RELOCATE / DROP / CONVERT。

source_payload_parity.reasoning_chains_note: build derives failure_modes from axioms (1 axiom = 1 chain); source's 4 reasoning_chains are imported as reasoning cards but consumed by a different mechanism

assets.build_coverage_notes: Source fields that DO NOT enter the structured payload as a named field (they enter via a different mechanism or are documentation-only): (a) KDNA_Patterns.json.terminology.{standard_terms,banned_terms} — kdna-studio-core/src/compile/index.js:165-166 hardcodes these to empty arrays in the structured payload, BUT compileEvolution generates one stage per locked term/banned_term card, so the content reaches the payload as evolution.stages entries (not as a structured field). (b) KDNA_Evolution.json.stages — compileEvolution ignores source.stages and regenerates from card.audit_log; the source's 4 evolution stages appear as 4 of the 48 total payload.evolution.stages entries (the other 44 are derived from axiom / scenario / self_check / case / reasoning cards). (c) reasoning_chains → failure_modes is a DIFFERENT-MECHANISM derivation (1 axiom = 1 chain). These are the known build-coverage limitations of kdna-studio-core v0.6.4. They do not block release; they are documented here for honesty.
assets.previous_version_status: v0.1.0 and v0.1.1 are preserved on GitHub Releases as historical previews but are NOT in this index. v0.1.2 is the first version to pass the 10-gate release standard.
assets.superseded_reason: Pre-pipeline asset with no source tree in the kdna-assets-internal lineage. Replaced by assets produced via the 10-gate pipeline. GitHub Release remains for backward compatibility but is no longer listed in README.

assets.name: Completion Adjudication
assets.description: Judges whether an AI Agent's 'I'm done' claim is actually done. Forces four cells before the 'done' word: DONE CLAIM / OBSERVABLE PROOF / USER INTENT MATCH / UNRESOLVED RISK.
assets.description_zh: 判断 Agent 的「我做完了」声明是否真的完成。要求四格：完成声明 / 可观察证据 / 用户意图匹配 / 未解决风险，缺一格不可说「完成」。

source_payload_parity.reasoning_chains_note: build derives failure_modes from axioms (1 axiom = 1 chain); the 5 source reasoning_chains are imported as reasoning cards. For completion_adjudication the counts match by design (5 axioms, 5 chains).

assets.build_coverage_notes: Source fields that DO NOT enter the structured payload as a named field (they enter via a different mechanism or are documentation-only): (a) KDNA_Patterns.json.terminology.{standard_terms,banned_terms} — kdna-studio-core/src/compile/index.js:165-166 hardcodes these to empty arrays in the structured payload, BUT compileEvolution generates one stage per locked term/banned_term card, so the content reaches the payload as evolution.stages entries (not as a structured field). For this asset: 3 standard_terms → 3 term stages; 18 banned_terms → 18 banned_term stages. (b) KDNA_Evolution.json.stages — compileEvolution ignores source.stages and regenerates from card.audit_log; the source's 4 evolution stages appear as 4 of the 58 total payload.evolution.stages entries (the other 54 are derived from axiom / scenario / self_check / case / reasoning / banned_term / term / framework cards). (c) reasoning_chains → failure_modes is a DIFFERENT-MECHANISM derivation (1 axiom = 1 chain). These are the known build-coverage limitations of kdna-studio-core v0.6.4. They do not block release; they are documented here for honesty.
assets.previous_version_status: v0.1.0 is preserved on GitHub Releases as a historical preview but is NOT in this index. v0.1.1 is the first version to pass the 10-gate publish standard.
assets.superseded_reason: Pre-pipeline asset with no source tree in the kdna-assets-internal lineage. Replaced by assets produced via the 10-gate pipeline. GitHub Release remains for backward compatibility but is no longer listed in README.

note: All 5 prior assets (2026-06-23 / 2026-06-25) are marked superseded as of 2026-06-30. The kdna-assets repo now only contains assets produced by the kdna-assets-internal 10-gate pipeline.
